summary: Premium material system upgrade testing completed successfully. All UI panels upgraded with material effects including backdrop blur, transparency, inner gradients, and subtle shadows. Full flow login → onboarding → dashboard functioning perfectly.
passed_tests: Onboarding page panel-material and topbar-material classes
Dashboard 11 panels with panel-material class (3 left + 1+4 center + 3 right)
TopBar topbar-material class with backdrop blur
All expected content present: 3 attention, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule, 4 tasks, 4 stats
Material effects active: backdrop-filter blur(14px), transparency, ::before gradients
Button interactivity: All buttons clickable and responsive
No heavy glow or bright effects - design appropriately subtle
Full user flow: login → 6-step onboarding → dashboard works seamlessly
CSS variables properly defined and implemented
